name: @latentminds/pi-quotas
description: Quota monitoring for the [Pi coding agent](https://github.com/mariozechner/pi). Shows remaining usage and rate limits for Anthropic, OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, and OpenRouter — directly in your Pi session.
